top_findings.summary: The skill uses osascript to read the user's iMessages for SMS verification codes during authentication. While 2FA handling is needed for Uber login, accessing the entire iMessage database (which contains private conversations) is excessive. A privacy-respecting alternative would be to prompt the user to manually enter the verification code or use a secure local SMS forwarding method that doesn't require full message access.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill uses osascript to read the user's iMessages for SMS verification codes during authentication. While 2FA handling is needed for Uber login, accessing the entire iMessage database (which contains private conversations) is excessive. A privacy-respecting alternative would be to prompt the user to manually enter the verification code or use a secure local SMS forwarding method that doesn't require full message access.
